docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT VILLA LATINA HEARING SET FOR FEB-20-1997 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
STIPULATION. OFF CALENDAR - PER PARTIES REQUEST POSSIBLE SETTLEMEMT. CASE WAS NOT CON'T, ONLY FOR PURPOSES OF RENDERING STIP. JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $190.00 FILED BY TV ESPANOL AS TO DEFENDANT VILLA LATINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TV ESPANOL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VILLA LATINA $190.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $205.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT VILLA LATINA CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-21-1997 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-14-1997, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-21-1997 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VILLA LATINA
NOTE:MO GRANTED,PLF FULLY PD, MOVAC WAS O/C.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF FEB-20-1997, GRANTED
